subject: CTF correction for EMDB deposition
body:
Hello,

I am currently in the EMDB deposition process and have a question regarding 
the "Correction type" field. The available options are "phase flipping and 
amplitude correction" and "phase flipping only." Considering that I checked 
the CTF box during particle picking, and the amplitude value was set to 
0.07, while leaving the phase shift box unchecked, could you guide me on 
the correct choice between the provided options? 

Thank you, Abhipsa
